actions.description:
### If you think this is incorrect

If you believe you've not been vaccinated against RSV, speak to your healthcare professional.

For anything else, visit our [help and support page](https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-app/nhs-app-help-and-support/vaccinations/check-and-book-an-rsv-vaccination).

processedSuggestions.statusText: You should have the RSV vaccine

suitabilityRules.ruleText:
## You've had your RSV vaccination

We believe you were vaccinated against RSV on 3 April 2025.

processedSuggestions.statusText: You should have the COVID-19 vaccine

suitabilityRules.ruleText:
## You're up to date

We believe you had your vaccination on 13 December 2025.

actions.description:
### If you think this is incorrect

If you believe you've not been vaccinated against COVID-19, speak to your healthcare professional.

For anything else, visit our [help and support page](https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-app/nhs-app-help-and-support/vaccinations/check-and-book-a-covid-19-vaccination).
